name: -r
--raw-output
options.description: Output raw strings, not JSON texts

name: -R
--raw-input
options.description: Read each line as a string instead of JSON

name: -s
--slurp
options.description: Read all inputs into an array

name: -S
--sort-keys
options.description: Output object keys in sorted order

name: -e
--exit-status
options.description: Set exit status based on the output

name: -n
--null-input
options.description: Use null as the single input value

name: -j
--join-output
options.description: Like -r but do not print a newline after each output

name: --tab
options.description: Use a tab for each indentation level

name: --indent
options.description: Use the given number of spaces for indentation

name: --arg
options.description: Set a variable to a string value

name: --argjson
options.description: Set a variable to a JSON value

name: --slurpfile
options.description: Set a variable to an array of JSON values from a file

name: --rawfile
options.description: Set a variable to the contents of a file as a string

name: --jsonargs
options.description: Treat remaining arguments as JSON values

name: --args
options.description: Treat remaining arguments as string values
